source: Pulled from the SpaceShipAlpha9 GitHub repo (not on the public web) — website/src/lib/products.ts, website/src/app (home + manifesto), sites/stylelift/src/app.

studio.name: Spaceship Alpha 9
studio.what: AI-native indie software studio. Fifteen products across AI, music, fashion, gaming, privacy, and infrastructure. No investors. No board. No permission required.
studio.press_quote: One indie studio. Fifteen products. Zero venture capital. The most ambitious software operation you've never heard of.
studio.relation: Space Pirate Zero is the flagship brand of Spaceship Alpha 9. Greg Chambers = Captain; co-founded with Daniela Chambers.
studio.space_tokens: Universal AI credit system — buy once, use in any SA9 product. StoreKit 2 (iOS) + Stripe (enterprise). One Keycloak SSO identity across the ecosystem.
manifesto: Build in Public, Ship in Stealth

products.name: Space Pirate Zero
products.tagline: One indie studio is quietly building the future of software.

stylelift.tagline: The AI stylist that learns what you actually like.
stylelift.pitch: What Stitch Fix promised. What AI can actually deliver.
stylelift.one_liner: Everything you need to shop smarter, starting at zero.
features: Style DNA Engine — 12 questions, a 512-dimensional style vector in under 60s
Virtual Try-On — AR fitting with realistic fabric physics
Smart Wardrobe Sync — photo import + email-receipt parsing from 200+ retailers in under 3 min
Curated Collections — budget-optimized capsule wardrobes that evolve with your taste
Social Style Boards / Circles — fashion as a social experience
Budget Optimizer — cost-per-wear analysis and sale alerts
stylelift.pricing: Free Forever; Pro at $9.99/mo. Creators earn 8-12% commission per sale, bi-weekly Stripe payouts, brand-partnership marketplace.
stylelift.stat: 87% average fit-confidence score across supported retailers
